image:image.image:title: Report.Farm — Mission-grade decisions from satellite
image:image.image:caption: Hero card for the Report.Farm platform — field signals on a tenant-isolated farm portfolio map.

image:image.image:title: Report.Farm — Solutions mapped to outcomes
image:image.image:caption: Six farm intelligence solutions on one operational stack: crop & yield monitoring, supply-chain intelligence, land & water risk, physical AI, integration, 24/7 ops.

image:image.image:title: Report.Farm — Industries served
image:image.image:caption: Verticals served by a unified farm intelligence stack: growers, agribusiness, food & beverage buyers, commodity traders, ag lenders, crop insurers.

image:image.image:title: Report.Farm — The Report.Farm Stack
image:image.image:caption: Six-layer architecture diagram from satellite data sources to operator surfaces.

image:image.image:title: Report.Farm — Request a Farm Plan
image:image.image:caption: NDA-ready by default. Response within one business day.
